description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior features light tan cladding, large glass windows, and multiple outdoor spaces including a patio, a small pool, and landscaped garden areas with trees and shrubs. The front facade is dominated by wide windows and a main entrance, while the rear and sides reveal additional outdoor seating and greenery. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, and the landscaping is carefully arranged with both paved and green areas. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on open, airy spaces and outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas including a patio, pool, and garden. The design is sleek and contemporary, featuring light tan cladding and symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the patio, pool, and garden area, with large windows and a driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible patio, pool, and additional greenery, as well as grouped windows.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the driveway, garage, and a row of trees along the side, with the flat roof and upper story visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
